<!--
  HEADS UP: this repository does NOT accept pull requests.

  Synheart SDKs are developed in an internal monorepo and mirrored here for
  transparency. External PRs are closed without review (see CONTRIBUTING.md
  for the rationale).

  Please file an issue instead — bug reports and feature requests are very
  welcome and are how external feedback influences the SDK:
  https://github.com/synheart-ai/synheart-wear-swift/issues/new/choose

  If you are an internal contributor: delete this notice and proceed.
-->

## This PR will be auto-closed

This is a source-available repository. Pull requests from outside the Synheart
team are closed automatically.

- For bugs or feature requests, please [open an issue](../../issues/new/choose).
- For security issues, see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
- For the rationale behind this policy, see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).

Thank you for your interest in Synheart.
